title: Charlotte Weekend Weather: Rain to Sunshine
summary: Expect scattered downpours today, improving to sunshine on Sunday with temperatures near 76 degrees before rain returns on Monday.
charlotte_impact: Residents should plan outdoor activities accordingly, considering the shifting weather patterns throughout the weekend.

title: Denver Couple Wins $1.6M Judgment Against Builder
summary: A Denver couple won a $1.6 million judgment against Nest Homes for breach of contract and fraudulent misrepresentation related to construction issues.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the risks involved in construction projects and the importance of due diligence when hiring contractors.

title: Shelby Officer Suspended for Punching Woman During Arrest
summary: A Shelby police officer has been suspended for punching a woman during an arrest. The officer's identity has not been released.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about police conduct and accountability, potentially impacting community trust in law enforcement.

title: Wrongful Death Lawsuit Filed in Fatal Plane Crash
summary: Greg Biffle's ex-wife, Nicole Biffle, filed a wrongful death lawsuit alleging negligence led to a plane crash at Statesville Regional Airport, killing 7.
charlotte_impact: Addresses accountability and safety regulations in aviation, with potential legal ramifications for those involved.

title: Car Break-ins Plague Clover Neighborhood Again
summary: Thieves targeted the Clover neighborhood for the second time, breaking into multiple vehicles and stealing at least one gun this week.
charlotte_impact: Residents should take precautions to secure their vehicles and valuables to prevent further incidents.

title: Salisbury Teacher Arrested on Sex Offense Charges
summary: David Steelman, 51, turned himself in on multiple sex offense charges involving a former student, dating back to 2012.
charlotte_impact: This case highlights the importance of safeguarding students and the severe consequences of teacher misconduct.

title: Charlotte Douglas Airport Receives $46.9M for Expansion
summary: The FAA awarded Charlotte Douglas $46.9M to expand the airport apron as part of a nationwide effort to modernize aviation infrastructure.
charlotte_impact: The expansion aims to improve airport efficiency and safety, benefiting travelers and the local economy.

title: Man Dies Months After Hit-and-Run in Charlotte
summary: Frank Leon Dent died months after a hit-and-run on West Sugar Creek Road. Police are seeking information on the unknown driver.
charlotte_impact: The community is urged to assist in identifying the driver to bring closure to the victim's family.

title: Hit-and-Run Suspect Arrested After Child Struck
summary: Shaiquailalia Di Ndia Lashi Harris was charged with felony hit-and-run after an 8-year-old was struck by a vehicle in south Charlotte on May 9.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the importance of responsible driving and the severe consequences of hit-and-run incidents.

title: Charlotte Transit System Reports Crime Drop
summary: Charlotte's transit system reports a 69% drop in crime on buses and light rail following security initiatives implemented over the past year.
charlotte_impact: Indicates improved safety for transit users, encouraging greater ridership and community well-being.

title: Liquor Purchases Fund Community Projects
summary: Mecklenburg County liquor purchases fund community projects, with increased funding for law enforcement and alcohol education.
charlotte_impact: Highlights how alcohol sales contribute to local services and initiatives, benefiting the community.

title: Teenager Drowns in Lake Wylie
summary: A 16-year-old drowned in Lake Wylie after failing to resurface after jumping into the water on Thursday afternoon.
charlotte_impact: Serves as a reminder of water safety and the potential dangers of swimming in open water.

title: Woman Killed in Single-Vehicle Crash in Rock Hill
summary: A 50-year-old woman died in a crash on Red River Road after her vehicle hit a fence and overturned.
charlotte_impact: Reminds drivers to exercise caution on the roads and the potential consequences of vehicle accidents.

title: Student Shatters Coach's 41-Year-Old Record
summary: ZaNovia Davis breaks Garinger High's 41-year-old 400m record under coach Tanya Filmore-Scott's guidance, marking a new era for the school.
charlotte_impact: Celebrates athletic achievement and the impact of mentorship in high school sports.

title: Multiple Arrests in North Charlotte Drug Case
summary: Federal and local operations lead to multiple arrests in a north Charlotte case involving drug trafficking and firearms charges.
charlotte_impact: Addresses ongoing efforts to combat drug-related crime and maintain community safety.
